summary: Comprehensive API Playground testing completed. All major features working correctly. Tested 8 Quick Scenarios, Demo Mode, Live Mode toggle, Code generation, Response viewer, All Endpoints list, Keyboard shortcuts, URL deep linking, and Integration points.

tests: T1.1: /playground route accessible - PASS
T1.2: Defaults to Demo Mode with emerald highlight - PASS
T1.3: Two-panel layout (Quick Scenarios + Request Builder) - PASS
T1.4: Onboarding overlay shows on first visit - PASS
T1.5: 'Got it' button dismisses overlay - PASS
T1.6: 'Don't show again' checkbox available - PASS
T2.1: Submit Spend Request ($49.99 to Anthropic) - approved with balance decrease - PASS
T2.2: Check Account Balance - shows balance in dollars - PASS
T2.3: Create Escrow Account - 201 with new esc_demo_ ID - PASS
T2.4: Set Spending Policy - 201 with policy limits - PASS
T2.5: CRITICAL - Trigger Denial ($750 to Meta Ads) - denied with 3 failed rules (Exceeds per-transaction limit, Vendor not allowed, Category not allowed) - PASS
T2.6: Trigger Human Approval ($300 to Anthropic) - pending_approval status with Approval ID - PASS
T2.7: View Audit Trail - returns spend.denied events - PASS
T2.8: List Pending Approvals - shows pending requests - PASS
T3.4: Reset Demo Data - balance resets from 445002 to 450001 cents - PASS
not_tested: T3.1: Balance depletion - not tested (would require many spend requests)
T3.3: Paused account - selector timeout during test

T7.2: Categories collapse/expand on click - PASS
T7.3: Endpoints clickable and load in request builder - PASS
T9.1: Cmd+Enter sends request - PASS

T13.1: Landing page 'Try the API Playground' CTA navigates to /playground - PASS
T13.2: Navbar 'Playground' link navigates to /playground - PASS

Live Mode button toggles to show API key input - PASS
API key input placeholder shows 'sk_live_... or sk_test_...' - PASS
Connect button visible - PASS

Shortcuts button visible - PASS

plain_english_responses.approved_spend: ✅ Spend Approved - Shows remaining balance, all rules passed, auto-approve threshold
plain_english_responses.denied_spend: ❌ Spend Denied - Shows failed rules with ✗ marks, passed rules with ✓ marks
plain_english_responses.pending_approval: ⏳ Pending Human Approval - Shows approval ID, auto-approve threshold exceeded reason

mocked_api_note: Demo Mode uses client-side simulation (simulateDemoRequest function in PlaygroundPage.js) - not real API calls. This is by design for the public playground.
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Playground comprehensive testing completed. All 8 Quick Scenarios work correctly with proper Plain English responses showing emoji status indicators. Demo Mode simulation working correctly. Live Mode toggle shows API key input. URL deep linking works for both scenarios and endpoints. Integration points (Landing page CTA, Navbar link, Docs cross-links) all navigate to /playground correctly. Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+Enter, Cmd+K) working. Status bar shows Demo Mode indicator, Marketing Budget balance, and escrow accounts count.
